Package com.nib.supernaut.backbone.embedded

Class EmbeddedMap<K,T>

java.lang.Object
com.nib.supernaut.backbone.embedded.AbstractEmbeddedObject
com.nib.supernaut.backbone.embedded.EmbeddedMap<K,T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
IBackboneMap<K,T>, IBackboneObject
Direct Known Subclasses:
EmbeddedMapCache
public class EmbeddedMap<K,T> extends AbstractEmbeddedObject implements IBackboneMap<K,T>

    Constructor
    Description
    EmbeddedMap(String name, EmbeddedBackbone backbone)
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    clear()
    Removes all of the mappings from this map.
    boolean
    containsKey(K key)
    Returns true if this map contains a mapping for the specified key.
    boolean
    fastPutIfAbsent(K id, T t)
    If the specified key is not already associated with a value, associate it with the given value.
    boolean
    fastPutIfExists(K id, T t)
    If the specified key is already associated with a value, associate it with the given value.
    long
    fastRemove(K key)
    Removes the mapping for a key from this map if it is present.
    boolean
    fastReplace(K id, T t)
    Replaces the entry for the specified key only if it is currently mapped to some value.
    T
    get(K id)
    Returns the value to which the specified key is mapped, or null if this map contains no mapping for the key.
    boolean
    isExists()
    Checks if the map exists.
    void
    put(K id, T t)
     
    int
    size()
    Returns the number of key-value mappings in this map.
    Collection<T>
    values()
    Returns a Collection view of the values contained in this map.

      public boolean isExists()
      Description copied from interface: IBackboneMap
      Checks if the map exists.
      Specified by:

      Returns:

      Returns the number of key-value mappings in this map.

      Removes all of the mappings from this map.

    • fastPutIfAbsent

      public boolean fastPutIfAbsent(K id, T t)
      Description copied from interface: IBackboneMap
      If the specified key is not already associated with a value, associate it with the given value.
      Specified by:
      fastPutIfAbsent in interface IBackboneMap<K,T>
      Parameters:
      id - the key with which the specified value is to be associated
      t - the value to be associated with the specified key
      Returns:
      true if the value was associated with the key, false if the key was already associated with a value

    • put

      public void put(K id, T t)

    • fastRemove

      public long fastRemove(K key)
      Description copied from interface: IBackboneMap
      Removes the mapping for a key from this map if it is present.
      Specified by:
      fastRemove in interface IBackboneMap<K,T>
      Parameters:
      key - key whose mapping is to be removed from the map
      Returns:
      the previous value associated with the key, or null if there was no mapping for the key

    • get

      public T get(K id)
      Description copied from interface: IBackboneMap
      Returns the value to which the specified key is mapped, or null if this map contains no mapping for the key.
      Specified by:
      get in interface IBackboneMap<K,T>
      Parameters:
      id - the key whose associated value is to be returned
      Returns:
      the value to which the specified key is mapped, or null if this map contains no mapping for the key

    • fastReplace

      public boolean fastReplace(K id, T t)
      Description copied from interface: IBackboneMap
      Replaces the entry for the specified key only if it is currently mapped to some value.
      Specified by:
      fastReplace in interface IBackboneMap<K,T>
      Parameters:
      id - key with which the specified value is associated
      t - value to be associated with the specified key
      Returns:
      true if the value was replaced

    • values

      public Collection<T> values()
      Description copied from interface: IBackboneMap
      Returns a Collection view of the values contained in this map.
      Specified by:
      values in interface IBackboneMap<K,T>
      Returns:
      a collection view of the values contained in this map

    • fastPutIfExists

      public boolean fastPutIfExists(K id, T t)
      Description copied from interface: IBackboneMap
      If the specified key is already associated with a value, associate it with the given value.
      Specified by:
      fastPutIfExists in interface IBackboneMap<K,T>
      Parameters:
      id - the key with which the specified value is to be associated
      t - the value to be associated with the specified key
      Returns:
      true if the value was associated with the key, false if the key was not already associated with a value

    • containsKey

      public boolean containsKey(K key)
      Description copied from interface: IBackboneMap
      Returns true if this map contains a mapping for the specified key.
      Specified by:
      containsKey in interface IBackboneMap<K,T>
      Parameters:
      key - key whose presence in this map is to be tested
      Returns:
      true if this map contains a mapping for the specified key
